reviewsPage.heroSubtitle: Real reviews from real homeowners across Greater Vancouver
reviewsPage.verifiedSubtitle: Every review is from a verified Google customer
reviewsPage.noReviews: No reviews available at this time.
reviewsPage.whyTrustSubtitle: Our commitment to quality speaks through our clients' words
reviewsPage.trustItem1Desc: Clear, detailed quotes with no hidden fees. Our clients consistently praise our upfront approach to pricing.
reviewsPage.trustItem2Desc: Meticulous attention to detail from demolition to final walkthrough. We don't cut corners.
reviewsPage.trustItem3Desc: Quick responses via WeChat, phone, or email. We keep you updated every step of the way.
reviewsPage.trustItem4Desc: We respect your timeline. Our team shows up early and works efficiently to meet deadlines.
reviewsPage.leaveReviewSubtitle: We'd love to hear about your renovation journey

faq.a1: Yes, every review on this page comes directly from Google Reviews. They are written by verified customers who used our renovation services.
faq.q2: How can I leave a review for Reno Stars?
faq.a2: After your project is complete, you can leave a review on our Google Business profile. Click the "Leave a Review" button above to be taken directly to our Google review page.
faq.a3: We maintain a perfect 5-star rating on Google with over 67 verified reviews from homeowners across Greater Vancouver.
faq.a4: Yes, we read and respond to every review. Your feedback helps us continuously improve our renovation services.
faq.q5: What areas do your reviewers come from?
faq.a5: Our reviews come from homeowners throughout the Greater Vancouver area including Vancouver, Richmond, Burnaby, Coquitlam, Surrey, and more.

reviewsPage.ctaSubtitle: Join our growing list of satisfied homeowners across Greater Vancouver
